## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --all` passes
- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` passes (if frontend changed)
- [ ] No comments added to code
- [ ] New exports are used somewhere (no dead code added)
